definition: an idea or opinion produced by thinking, or occurring suddenly in the mind

sentence.en: The prevailing thought among software architects is that decoupling monolithic structures significantly enhances system resilience.
sentence.uz: Dasturiy ta'minot arxitektorlari orasida keng tarqalgan fikr shundan iboratki, monolit tuzilmalarni ajratish tizimning chidamliligini sezilarli darajada oshiradi.

definition: moving in one side and out of the other side of an opening, channel, or location

sentence.en: Navigating through complex game-tree permutations requires sophisticated algorithms to evaluate optimal tactical decisions.
sentence.uz: Murakkab o'yin-daraxti o'zgarishlari orqali harakatlanish maqbul taktik qarorlarni baholash uchun murakkab algoritmlarni talab qiladi.

definition: the indefinite continued progress of existence and events in the past, present, and future

sentence.en: Optimizing memory allocation in data-intensive applications dramatically reduces the overall processing time for large datasets.
sentence.uz: Ma'lumotlarni ko'p talab qiluvchi ilovalarda xotira taqsimotini optimallashtirish katta ma'lumotlar to'plamlarini qayta ishlashning umumiy vaqtini keskin kamaytiradi.

definition: expressing motion in the direction of a particular location

sentence.en: Migrating to a cloud-based infrastructure allows enterprises to scale their operations globally without prohibitive upfront costs.
sentence.uz: Bulutga asoslangan infratuzilmaga o'tish korxonalarga dastlabki katta xarajatlarsiz o'z faoliyatlarini global miqyosda kengaytirish imkonini beradi.

definition: with or in proximity to another person or people

sentence.en: When cross-functional teams work together seamlessly, they can expedite the delivery of innovative technological solutions.
sentence.uz: Turli soha mutaxassislaridan iborat jamoalar birgalikda muammosiz ishlaganda, ular innovatsion texnologik yechimlarni yetkazib berishni tezlashtirishlari mumkin.

definition: to a higher degree than is desirable, permissible, or possible; excessively

sentence.en: Relying too heavily on outdated automation scripts can obscure critical underlying vulnerabilities within the application.
sentence.uz: Eskirgan avtomatlashtirish skriptlariga o'ta qattiq tayanish ilova ichidagi muhim asosiy zaifliklarni yashirishi mumkin.

definition: equivalent to the sum of one and one; one less than three

sentence.en: The deployment pipeline consists of two mandatory security gateways to prevent unauthorized code modifications.
sentence.uz: Joylashtirish (deployment) quvuri ruxsatsiz kod o'zgarishlarining oldini olish uchun ikkita majburiy xavfsizlik shlyuzidan iborat.

definition: extending or directly below something

sentence.en: Systems operating under extreme concurrency loads must implement robust mutex mechanisms to avert catastrophic race conditions.
sentence.uz: Ekstremal parallel yuklanishlar ostida ishlaydigan tizimlar halokatli poyga holatlarini (race conditions) oldini olish uchun kuchli muteks mexanizmlarini joriy etishi shart.

definition: towards a higher place or position

sentence.en: Scaling up the server capacity became an unavoidable necessity as the user base of the e-learning platform expanded exponentially.
sentence.uz: Elektron ta'lim platformasining foydalanuvchilar bazasi eksponensial o'sib borishi bilan server sig'imini oshirish (tepaga ko'tarish) muqarrar zaruratga aylandi.

definition: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself and one or more other people as the object of a verb or preposition

sentence.en: The comprehensive audit report provided us with actionable insights to remediate the inefficiencies in our continuous integration pipeline.
sentence.uz: Keng qamrovli audit hisoboti bizga uzluksiz integratsiya quvurimizdagi samarasizliklarni bartaraf etish uchun amaliy tushunchalarni taqdim etdi.

definition: take, hold, or deploy (something) as a means of accomplishing a purpose or achieving a result

sentence.en: Engineers increasingly use specialized diagnostic tools to monitor and mitigate excessive resource consumption in backend services.
sentence.uz: Muhandislar backend xizmatlarida ortiqcha resurslar iste'molini kuzatish va kamaytirish uchun borgan sari ixtisoslashtirilgan diagnostika vositalaridan foydalanmoqdalar.

definition: used for emphasis

sentence.en: The threshold for accepting a new authentication protocol must be set very high to preclude any potential security breaches.
sentence.uz: Har qanday potentsial xavfsizlik buzilishlarining oldini olish uchun yangi autentifikatsiya protokolini qabul qilish chegarasi juda yuqori belgilanishi kerak.

definition: a transparent, tasteless, odorless, and nearly colorless chemical substance

sentence.en: Ensuring an uninterrupted supply of clean water is fundamentally critical for maintaining robust public health in sprawling metropolitan areas.
sentence.uz: Toza suvning uzluksiz ta'minotini kafolatlash kengayib borayotgan metropoliya hududlarida mustahkam jamoat salomatligini saqlash uchun asosan muhimdir.

definition: a method, style, or manner of doing something

sentence.en: Transitioning to a functional programming paradigm offers a more predictable way to handle complex state mutations.
sentence.uz: Funktsional dasturlash paradigmasiga o'tish murakkab holat mutatsiyalarini (state mutations) boshqarishning ko'proq bashorat qilinadigan yo'lini taklif etadi.

definition: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself and one or more other people considered together

sentence.en: Unless we implement proactive measures to balance the server loads, network latency will inevitably degrade the user experience.
sentence.uz: Agar biz server yuklanishlarini muvozanatlash uchun faol choralarni ko'rmasak, tarmoq kechikishi muqarrar ravishda foydalanuvchi tajribasini yomonlashtiradi.

definition: in a good or satisfactory way

sentence.en: A well-architected asynchronous backend ensures that high volumes of incoming traffic do not bottleneck the central database.
sentence.uz: Yaxshi tuzilgan asinxron backend kiruvchi trafikning yuqori hajmi markaziy ma'lumotlar bazasida tirbandlik (bottleneck) yaratmasligini ta'minlaydi.

definition: past tense of go

sentence.en: After thorough debugging, the development team finally went ahead with integrating the new payment gateway into the live environment.
sentence.uz: Puxta nosozliklarni tuzatgandan so'ng, dasturchilar jamoasi nihoyat yangi to'lov shlyuzini jonli muhitga integratsiya qilishga kirishdilar (bordilar).

definition: second person singular past, plural past, and past subjunctive of be

sentence.en: The automated test cases were meticulously designed to comprehensively cover every conceivable edge case within the mobile application.
sentence.uz: Avtomatlashtirilgan test holatlari mobil ilovadagi har bir mumkin bo'lgan chekka holatni (edge case) to'liq qamrab olish uchun sinchkovlik bilan ishlab chiqilgan edi.

definition: asking for information specifying something

sentence.en: Determining exactly what caused the spontaneous system reboot requires a meticulous examination of the kernel logs.
sentence.uz: Tizimning to'satdan qayta ishga tushishiga aynan nima sabab bo'lganini aniqlash yadro (kernel) jurnallarini sinchkovlik bilan tekshirishni talab qiladi.

definition: at what time

sentence.en: Data consistency must be rigorously enforced, especially when multiple concurrent processes attempt to modify the same database entry.
sentence.uz: Ma'lumotlar izchilligi, ayniqsa, bir nechta parallel jarayonlar bir xil ma'lumotlar bazasi yozuvini o'zgartirishga harakat qilganda, qat'iy ta'minlanishi shart.

definition: in or to what place or position

sentence.en: Identifying environments where network bandwidth is severely constrained is crucial for optimizing media delivery protocols.
sentence.uz: Tarmoq o'tkazuvchanligi keskin cheklangan muhitlarni (qayerda ekanligini) aniqlash media yetkazib berish protokollarini optimallashtirish uchun juda muhimdir.

definition: asking for information specifying one or more people or things from a definite set

sentence.en: The architectural committee must decide which programming paradigm best accommodates the long-term scalability requirements of the project.
sentence.uz: Arxitektura qo'mitasi loyihaning uzoq muddatli miqyosiylik talablariga qaysi dasturlash paradigmasi eng mos kelishini hal qilishi kerak.

definition: during the time that; at the same time as

sentence.en: While implementing a microservices architecture inherently provides flexibility, it simultaneously introduces substantial operational overhead.
sentence.uz: Mikroservislar arxitekturasini amalga oshirish tabiiy ravishda moslashuvchanlikni ta'minlasa-da (ta'minlayotgan bir vaqtda), u bir vaqtning o'zida katta operatsion qo'shimcha yukni keltirib chiqaradi.

definition: what or which person or people

sentence.en: Engineers who possess a profound understanding of concurrency management are highly sought after in the modern tech industry.
sentence.uz: Parallelizm boshqaruvini chuqur tushunadigan (kimki) muhandislar zamonaviy texnologiya sohasida yuqori talabga ega.

definition: for what reason or purpose

sentence.en: Comprehending precisely why a specific algorithmic approach failed under load is essential for preventing future system degradation.
sentence.uz: Nima uchun (nega) o'ziga xos algoritmik yondashuv yuklama ostida muvaffaqiyatsizlikka uchraganini aniq tushunish kelajakda tizim degradatsiyasini oldini olish uchun zarur.

definition: expressing the future tense

sentence.en: Failure to adequately address technical debt early on will undoubtedly lead to insurmountable maintenance challenges in subsequent development phases.
sentence.uz: Texnik qarzni erta bosqichda yetarlicha hal qilmaslik shubhasiz keyingi rivojlanish bosqichlarida yengib bo'lmaydigan texnik xizmat ko'rsatish muammolariga olib keladi (-ajak).

definition: accompanied by (another person or thing)

sentence.en: Coupling a reactive frontend with a highly robust and concurrent backend produces an exceptionally smooth user interface.
sentence.uz: Reaktiv frontendni o'ta mustahkam va parallel ishlovchi backend bilan birlashtirish favqulodda silliq foydalanuvchi interfeysini yaratadi.

definition: a single distinct meaningful element of speech or writing

sentence.en: In academic writing, ensuring that every word contributes meaningfully to the overarching argument is a hallmark of sophisticated discourse.
sentence.uz: Akademik yozishda, har bir so'zning umumiy dalilga mazmunli hissa qo'shishini ta'minlash murakkab nutqning o'ziga xos belgisidir.

definition: activity involving mental or physical effort done in order to achieve a purpose or result

sentence.en: Pioneering new standards in mobile test automation requires relentless, innovative work and an acute attention to intricate details.
sentence.uz: Mobil testlarni avtomatlashtirishda yangi standartlarni kashf etish tinimsiz, innovatsion ishni va murakkab detallarga e'tiborni talab qiladi.

definition: a living organism that feeds on organic matter, typically having specialized sense organs and nervous system

sentence.en: Preserving diverse animal habitats is fundamentally crucial for maintaining the delicate ecological balance of our fragile biosphere.
sentence.uz: Turli xil hayvonlar yashash joylarini saqlab qolish bizning nozik biosferamizning nozik ekologik muvozanatini saqlash uchun juda muhimdir.

definition: a thing said, written, or done to deal with or as a reaction to a question, statement, or situation

sentence.en: Discovering a definitive answer to the intermittent database deadlock issue necessitated a deep dive into the transaction isolation levels.
sentence.uz: Vaqti-vaqti bilan yuz beradigan ma'lumotlar bazasi tranzaksiyalar bloki (deadlock) muammosiga aniq javob topish tranzaksiyalarni izolyatsiya qilish darajalariga chuqur sho'ng'ishni talab qildi.

definition: the lowest part or edge of something, especially the part on which it rests or is supported

sentence.en: Establishing a solidly documented architectural base is a prerequisite before delegating complex features to junior software developers.
sentence.uz: Murakkab funksiyalarni kichik dasturchilarga topshirishdan oldin mustahkam hujjatlashtirilgan arxitektura asosini o'rnatish dastlabki shartdir.

definition: carry the weight of; support

sentence.en: A highly resilient infrastructure is designed to seamlessly bear the brunt of sudden, unprecedented spikes in concurrent user traffic.
sentence.uz: Yuqori chidamli infratuzilma bir vaqtda foydalanuvchilar trafigining to'satdan, misli ko'rilmagan o'sishlarining asosiy zarbasini muammosiz ko'tarish (chidash) uchun mo'ljallangan.

definition: a combination of qualities, such as shape, color, or form, that pleases the aesthetic senses

sentence.en: Many mathematicians argue that there is an intrinsic beauty in a highly optimized, elegantly succinct algorithm.
sentence.uz: Ko'pgina matematiklar yuqori darajada optimallashtirilgan, oqlangan tarzda qisqa bo'lgan algoritmda o'ziga xos go'zallik borligini ta'kidlaydilar.

definition: a piece of furniture for sleep or rest

sentence.en: The study suggests that utilizing screens immediately before going to bed drastically impairs the quality of restorative sleep.
sentence.uz: Tadqiqot shuni ko'rsatadiki, yotishdan (to'shakka borishdan) oldin darhol ekranlardan foydalanish tiklovchi uyqu sifatini keskin yomonlashtiradi.

definition: of the most excellent, effective, or desirable type or quality

sentence.en: Determining the absolute best deployment strategy requires carefully weighing the trade-offs between zero-downtime and resource expenditure.
sentence.uz: Mutlaq eng yaxshi joylashtirish strategiyasini aniqlash nol to'xtab qolish (zero-downtime) va resurs xarajatlari o'rtasidagi kelishuvlarni diqqat bilan o'lchashni talab qiladi.

definition: a warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrate distinguished by the possession of feathers, wings, and a beak

sentence.en: Observing the intricate mating rituals of a rare tropical bird provides invaluable data for evolutionary biologists.
sentence.uz: Noyob tropik qushning murakkab juftlashish rituallarini kuzatish evolyutsion biologlar uchun bebaho ma'lumotlarni beradi.

definition: of the very darkest color owing to the absence of or complete absorption of light

sentence.en: The unexpected financial crisis acted as a black swan event, entirely disrupting previously stable global supply chains.
sentence.uz: Kutilmagan moliyaviy inqiroz ilgari barqaror bo'lgan global ta'minot zanjirlarini butunlay buzadigan qora oqqush (kutilmagan halokatli) hodisasi sifatida harakat qildi.

definition: of a color intermediate between green and violet, as of the sky or sea on a sunny day

sentence.en: Exposure to blue light emitted by electronic devices late at night significantly disrupts the body's natural circadian rhythm.
sentence.uz: Kechasi elektron qurilmalar tomonidan chiqariladigan ko'k yorug'lik ta'sirida bo'lish tananing tabiiy sirkadiyalik ritmini sezilarli darajada buzadi.

definition: a small vessel propelled on water by oars, sails, or an engine

sentence.en: The isolated island community heavily relies on a singular supply boat for importing essential medicinal and nutritional provisions.
sentence.uz: Yakkalanib qolgan orol jamoasi zarur tibbiy va oziq-ovqat zaxiralarini import qilish uchun bitta ta'minot qayig'iga tayanadi.

definition: the physical structure of a person or an animal, including the bones, flesh, and organs

sentence.en: A vast, interconnected body of academic research unequivocally supports the correlation between regular physical exercise and cognitive longevity.
sentence.uz: Keng va o'zaro bog'liq bo'lgan akademik tadqiqotlar tanasi (to'plami) muntazam jismoniy mashqlar va kognitiv uzoq umr ko'rish o'rtasidagi bog'liqlikni aniq qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.

definition: a written or printed work consisting of pages glued or sewn together along one side and bound in covers

sentence.en: Publishing an authoritative book on designing data-intensive applications requires both profound theoretical knowledge and practical engineering experience.
sentence.uz: Ma'lumotlarni ko'p talab qiluvchi ilovalarni loyihalash bo'yicha nufuzli kitob nashr etish chuqur nazariy bilim va amaliy muhandislik tajribasini talab qiladi.

definition: the lowest point or part of something

sentence.en: Thoroughly investigating the root cause of the system failure requires engineers to drill down to the very bottom of the error logs.
sentence.uz: Tizim nosozligining asl sababini sinchkovlik bilan o'rganish muhandislardan xatolar jurnallarining eng tubiga (tagiga) tushishni talab qiladi.

definition: a container with a flat base and sides, typically square or rectangular and having a lid

sentence.en: Thinking outside the proverbial box is an indispensable skill for developers aiming to resolve unprecedented architectural bottlenecks.
sentence.uz: Odatdagi qutidan tashqarida fikrlash (nostandart fikrlash) kutilmagan arxitektura tirbandliklarini hal qilishni maqsad qilgan dasturchilar uchun ajralmas mahoratdir.

definition: a male child or young man

sentence.en: Educational sociologists study how systemic disadvantages uniquely impact the academic trajectory of a young boy growing up in marginalized urban communities.
sentence.uz: Ta'lim sotsiologlari tizimli kamchiliklar chekka shahar jamoalarida o'sayotgan yosh o'g'il bolaning akademik trayektoriyasiga qanday o'ziga xos ta'sir qilishini o'rganadilar.

definition: take or go with (someone or something) to a place

sentence.en: Integrating advanced AI capabilities into existing management software can bring immense efficiency gains and actionable data analytics.
sentence.uz: Mavjud boshqaruv dasturiy ta'minotiga ilg'or AI imkoniyatlarini integratsiya qilish katta samaradorlik yutuqlari va amaliy ma'lumotlar tahlilini keltirib chiqarishi mumkin.

definition: a man or boy in relation to other sons and daughters of his parents

sentence.en: Maintaining strong familial bonds, such as checking in with a sibling or brother, can serve as a vital emotional anchor amidst high-stress corporate environments.
sentence.uz: Yuqori stressli korporativ muhit sharoitida opa-singil yoki aka-uka bilan xabar olib turish kabi kuchli oilaviy rishtalarni saqlab qolish hayotiy muhim hissiy tayanch bo'lib xizmat qilishi mumkin.

definition: of a color produced by mixing red, yellow, and blue, as of dark wood or rich soil

sentence.en: The transition to sustainable packaging has led many international fast-food chains to adopt unbleached, brown paper materials.
sentence.uz: Barqaror qadoqlashga o'tish ko'plab xalqaro tez ovqatlanish tarmoqlarini oqartirilmagan, jigarrang qog'oz materiallarini qabul qilishga olib keldi.

definition: construct (something) by putting parts or material together

sentence.en: To successfully build a high-performance concurrent application, software engineers must possess a granular understanding of hardware limitations.
sentence.uz: Yuqori samarali parallel dasturni muvaffaqiyatli qurish uchun dasturiy ta'minot muhandislari apparat cheklovlarini chuqur tushunishlari kerak.

definition: be destroyed, damaged, or injured by heat or fire

sentence.en: Consistently working overtime without adequate rest periods will inevitably cause highly skilled professionals to burn out prematurely.
sentence.uz: Muntazam ravishda yetarli dam olish davrlarisiz ortiqcha vaqt ishlash muqarrar ravishda yuqori malakali mutaxassislarning muddatidan oldin kuyib ketishiga (ruhiy zo'riqishiga) olib keladi.
